items.claim: Tracy Cortez is physically tough and durable.
items.quote: Tracy's tough as [ __ ] though. You got to give her. She is abs. She's so tough. She ate that knee, that grounded knee.

items.claim: Dricus Du Plessis has superior grappling control compared to Kamaru Usman.
items.quote: Chv is on that different level when it comes to control. And I I don't know. I just don't think DDP's walking buckley level grappling. I think he's going to be able to keep it up.

items.claim: Kamaru Usman suffers from chronic knee injuries.
Dricus Du Plessis is 32 years old.
Christian Leroy Duncan will have a significant size advantage over Jared Cannonier.
items.quote: Christian's going to look big in there, bro. He's going to look big in there against Jared. Yeah, dude. He's 6'2 against 5'9.
